# Data Protection Act

Jurisdiction: Finland
Region: FI
Citation: Data Protection Act 1050/2018
Authority: Finlex / Data Protection Ombudsman
Source URL: https://www.finlex.fi/en/laki/kaannokset/2018/en20181050
Topics: children_data, sensitive_data, public_sector, data_subject_rights, accountability
Keywords: Finland Data Protection Act, Tietosuojalaki, Data Protection Ombudsman

## Summary
Finnish national law supplementing GDPR and setting rules for national processing contexts and supervisory powers.

## Key compliance obligations
- Apply Finnish supplements and age rules.
- Assess public-sector and special-category provisions.
- Document use of national derogations.
